name: develevate-ai
description: Production-grade AI-powered developer interview and career SaaS platform.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:api: node scripts/run-with-env.cjs npm run dev -w apps/api
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.docker:up: node scripts/run-docker.cjs compose up -d postgres redis
scripts.db:push: node scripts/run-with-env.cjs npm run prisma:push -w apps/api
scripts.db:seed: node scripts/run-with-env.cjs npm run prisma:seed -w apps/api
scripts.setup:local: npm run docker:up && npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed && npm run doctor
